notes: Operational roadmap for Post-Entry duty-rate sources. Source status controls product trust wording: auto_updatable means a maintained script can refresh official machine-readable rates; hybrid_official_candidate means some maintained rules can be promoted from an official parser while ambiguous prefixes stay scope-check gated; benchmark_updatable means a maintained script can refresh local benchmark metadata but the rate remains indicative; official_link means an official source is identified but not machine-refreshed yet; benchmark means local pre-check math only.

sources.name: United States HTS / USITC
sources.status_reason: USITC exposes a stable machine-readable HTS export endpoint for maintained HS prefixes.
sources.current_scope: General HTS base duty for maintained HS prefixes. Additional duties such as Section 301 and AD/CVD remain separate benchmark/scope checks.
sources.next_action: Keep USITC sync running before releases and monitor changes in data/duty-rates.json.

sources.name: EU TARIC
sources.authority: European Commission Taxation and Customs Union
sources.status_reason: EU TARIC consultation and CIRCABC full database are reachable; maintained HS prefixes are split so unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country duty rows can be promoted to official_source_checked while ambiguous prefixes stay scope_check_required.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid EU coverage: official TARIC candidate duty for unambiguous HS prefixes, scope-check status for ambiguous prefixes, and benchmark member-state VAT shown separately.
sources.next_action: Continue TARIC workbook sync; promote only prefixes with one unambiguous ERGA OMNES third-country-duty rate and keep ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated.

sources.name: Germany import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / German tax authority
sources.status_reason: Germany uses EU TARIC for customs duty; the EU updater now promotes unambiguous TARIC duty candidates and keeps ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated. Germany VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid Germany coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Germany VAT benchmark separately.
sources.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.

sources.name: Netherlands import VAT with EU TARIC duty
sources.authority: European Commission TARIC / Dutch tax authority
sources.status_reason: Netherlands uses EU TARIC for customs duty; the EU updater now promotes unambiguous TARIC duty candidates and keeps ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated. Netherlands VAT remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid Netherlands coverage: official TARIC candidate duty where unambiguous, TARIC scope-check where exact code is needed, and Netherlands VAT benchmark separately.
sources.next_action: Keep using EU TARIC updater; next upgrade is exact TARIC-code input so ambiguous prefixes can resolve to one official rate.

sources.name: Singapore Customs duties and GST
sources.status_reason: Singapore import duty treatment for covered electronics is maintained as duty-free benchmark plus GST; official source is not parsed as machine tariff data yet.
sources.current_scope: Maintained Singapore duty-free electronics benchmark plus 9% GST value treatment reminder.
sources.next_action: Research official tariff/GST machine source; keep GST benchmark explicit until then.

sources.name: Mexico tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Official source identified. Local benchmark metadata can refresh automatically while exact TIGIE extraction remains pending.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT plus TIGIE tariff-line review reminder.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research machine-readable TIGIE source before official automatic rates.

sources.name: Japan Customs tariff
sources.status_reason: Japan Customs dated tariff schedule and chapter pages are parseable into official candidates; unambiguous maintained prefixes can be promoted while ambiguous prefixes stay exact-code gated.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid official candidate: Japan Customs chapter rows can be parsed into official candidates; consumption tax remains a separate benchmark layer.
sources.next_action: Promote only unambiguous Japan official candidates; keep exact statistical-code scope checks for mixed-rate prefixes.

sources.name: Korea Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Korea Customs tariff inquiry source is identified and monitored; the next blocker is exact 10-digit HS result parsing before official automatic rates.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid official candidate: official tariff lookup availability is monitored; VAT remains a benchmark layer until exact 10-digit HS parsing is connected.
sources.next_action: Build the KCS exact 10-digit HS parser; promote only rows with one official base-duty answer.

sources.name: India Customs Tariff / ICEGATE CIP
sources.authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs / ICEGATE
sources.status_reason: India is high-priority for electronics trade opportunity and Post-Entry. Official ICEGATE/CIP sources are identified; exact BCD/SWS/IGST scope parsing remains the P1 blocker.
sources.current_scope: Hybrid official candidate: official source path is monitored, while exact BCD/SWS/IGST tariff-line parsing is still required before filing-grade rates.
sources.next_action: Build India exact tariff-line parser for ICEGATE/CIP or CBIC tariff data; promote only after exact HS, BCD, SWS, and IGST basis are machine-verified.

sources.name: China import tariff / VAT
sources.authority: General Administration of Customs / Ministry of Finance
sources.status_reason: Local benchmark exists, but official China tariff lookup is not connected to an updater yet.
sources.current_scope: Local benchmark for electronics import duty and VAT.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; map official China tariff lookup or maintained local tariff table before promoting official exact rates.

sources.name: Vietnam Customs tariff / VAT
sources.status_reason: Official customs source identified, but preferential tariff and VAT data are not wired yet.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark VAT/duty status for electronics; preferential tariffs depend on origin and entry date.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research downloadable Vietnam tariff/VAT source before promoting official exact rates.

sources.name: Malaysia Customs SST / duty
sources.status_reason: Official customs/SST source identified, but tariff and exemption data are not wired yet.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research tariff/SST list machine readability and exemptions before promoting official exact rates.

sources.name: Taiwan Customs tariff / business tax
sources.status_reason: Official customs source identified; lower current priority than US/EU/SG/MX/JP/KR/VN/MY.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark business tax and tariff-line reminder.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running; research customs tariff lookup data export options before promoting official exact rates.

sources.name: Russia / EAEU tariff and VAT
sources.status_reason: Official source identified, but sanctions scope must stay separate from ordinary duty math.
sources.current_scope: Benchmark EAEU duty/VAT plus sanctions and restricted-party scope warning.
sources.next_action: Keep benchmark updater running and sanctions scope flag separate from ordinary duty math.
